title: leimanthium laetum
intro: Leimanthium laetum, also known as yellow fairy orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Guinea. It is a terrestrial orchid, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Leimanthium laetum is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
